content: Happy almost birthday America! We made this one for you. Voice Narration: Jon Bailey the EPIC VOICE GUY (@epicvoiceguy on all socials) Title Design: Robert Holtby Written by: Spencer Gilbert & Lon Harris Produced by: Spencer Gilbert Edited by: Kevin Williamsen Post-Production Manager: Emin Bassavand Manager, Video Operations: Tiffany Tse Post-Production Specialist: Rebecca Castaneda VP Content: Max Dionne No one actually reads these right? If you do, comment “Brawndo's got what plants crave” below #honesttrailers #entertainment #parody #trailer #funny #idiocracy #america250 #stupid
chineseTitle: | 诚 | 实 | 的 | 预 | 告 | 片 | | | 白 | 痴 |
chineseContent: 美国即将生日快乐！我们为你做了这个。配音旁白：EPIC VOICE GUY Jon Bailey（在所有社交媒体上@epicvoiceguy）标题设计：Robert Holtby 撰写：Spencer Gilbert 和 Lon Harris 制作：Spencer Gilbert 编辑：Kevin Williamsen 后期制作经理：Emin Bassavand 视频运营经理：Tiffany Tse 后期制作专家：Rebecca Castaneda 副总裁 内容：Max Dionne 没有人真正读懂这些内容吗？如果您这样做，请在下面评论“Brawndo 拥有植物所渴望的东西”#honesttrailers #entertainment #parody #trailer #funny #idiocracy #america250 #stupid
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
